share_message.text: Check out Mooneva. A private, offline period tracker from Sweden. No ads, no tracking.

notifications.title: Notification Manager
notifications.discrete_mode_note: While discrete mode is active, notifications use neutral, task-like wording.
notifications.gentle_mode_desc: Alerts only if inactive for 48h during flow.
notifications.period_starts_desc: Morning alert when your period is expected.
notifications.period_ends_desc: Reminder to confirm the end of your flow.
notifications.period_ends_desc_discrete: Task complete? Confirm to close log.
notifications.period_input_reminder_desc: Notify you to enter the flow for period day.
notifications.fertility_reminder_desc: Heads-up before your fertile window opens.
notifications.ovulation_reminder_desc: Specific alert for peak fertility day.
notifications.daily_log_desc: A reminder to log your mood and symptoms for the day.
notifications.daily_log_desc_discrete: Check-in: Any new tasks to log?
notifications.pms_reminder_desc: Your period is expected in a few days. Be kind to yourself if you're feeling off.
notifications.late_period_desc: We haven't seen a log from you yet. Is your cycle running a bit late?
notifications.pill_reminder_desc: Daily reminder to take your medication/pill.

branding.title: Mooneva
branding.subtitle: Private Period Tracker
branding.passion_not_ads: Your data stays on your device. We run on passion, not ads.
branding.story_body: Mooneva is a Swedish femtech startup reimagining period care. We’re building a sustainable ecosystem that’s kind to your body, your wallet, and the planet.

alerts.short_cycle_desc: Cycles < 21 days (Polymenorrhea) detected in history. Using 21-day baseline for safety.
alerts.high_accuracy: High Accuracy: Predictions are based on your personalized 3-cycle average.
alerts.low_accuracy: Low Accuracy: Predictions will improve after you log 3 full cycles.

calendar.edit_mode_hint: Tap days to add, remove or adjust your period days
calendar.empty_state_hint: Tap 'Period?' below to mark your last period
calendar.how_to_log_period_body: Tap "Period?" → tap days to add or remove period days → tap Done.
calendar.how_to_log_period_tip: To add a past period, swipe to a previous month first.
calendar.how_to_log_daily_body: Tap any day on the calendar to log mood, symptoms, or notes.

log.flow_hint: Spotting doesn't start Day 1. Select Light/Medium if flow has fully started.
log.spotting_hint_no_period: Track spotting or add/change a period
log.unavailable_future_date: Logging is not yet available for this date. You can only log data for the past and up to 7 days into the future.
log.withdrawal_bleed_desc: Tag if on hormonal birth control (pill, ring, patch)
log.withdrawal_tagged: This period is tagged as a withdrawal bleed and will be excluded from natural cycle statistics.
log.ignore_tagged: This period will be excluded from cycle length calculations and averages.
log.no_period_advanced: This date is not part of a period. Start or select a period day to access advanced options.

settings.cycle_mgmt_desc: Cycle length, prediction, birth control, medical overrides
settings.birth_control_desc: Hides fertility and tags withdrawal bleeds.
settings.birth_control_dialog_message: You have an active period. How should it be tagged?
settings.pregnancy_mode_desc: Pauses all predictions and period alerts.
settings.fertility_disclaimer_body: This app provides fertility window estimates based on cycle length for general awareness only. These predictions are not intended for achieving or preventing pregnancy and should not be relied upon for pregnancy planning or contraception. For greater accuracy, consider tracking basal body temperature, cervical mucus, or using a symptothermal method with optional LH testing.
settings.adaptive_prediction_off_desc: Adaptive prediction will be turned off. You will need to manually re-activate it if you turn off this mode later.
settings.reminders_desc: Daily logs, period alerts, ovulation notifications
settings.security_desc_long: This password will encrypt your personal data, making it inaccessible without the code.
settings.dark_neumorphism_desc: Use the Balanced Moonstone night theme (experimental)
settings.discrete_mode_full_desc: Changes the app UI to a simple task manager, switches the app icon, and restarts the app. To toggle remember, hold the + button (bottom right) for 2 seconds.
settings.lock_after_desc: How long the app stays unlocked when you switch away
settings.data_mgmt_desc: Export, import, archive, or delete your data
settings.archive_history_desc: Ignore old data for predictions while keeping records.
settings.archive_confirm: This will reset your predictions by ignoring all history before today. Your old data will still be visible in the calendar, but the algorithm will start fresh. Continue?
settings.import_confirm: This will overwrite your current data with the backup. Are you sure you want to continue?
settings.invalid_backup: This file doesn't look like a valid Mooneva backup.
settings.feedback_title: Help us build something you love
settings.save_to_file: Save your data to a file
settings.password_warning: Don't forget this. There is no way to recover an encrypted backup without the password.
settings.archive_desc_long: Securely archive past logs so your trends reflect your current health. Data is hidden from view but can be restored at any time.
settings.restore_archived_confirm: Restore all archived data? All past entries will be included in trends and predictions again.
settings.archive_older_data_desc: Everything before the following date will be hidden from trends. You can restore it anytime.
settings.delete_all_data_confirm: This will permanently delete all your data. There is no going back.
settings.medical_privacy_desc: This report contains detailed cycle history. Use this only for professional medical consultations.
settings.report_footer: Report generated by Mooneva Private Tracker. Not a medical diagnosis. Averages based on available logged data.
settings.no_data_logged: No data logged for this cycle.
settings.birth_control_sub_desc: Hide fertility, tag bleeds as withdrawal
settings.birth_control_pill_hint: Best for combined pill, ring, or patch users.
settings.pause_predictions_full_desc: Pause all predictions (pregnancy, irregular, etc.) — e.g. in case of pregnancy or when you prefer not to see estimates.
settings.adaptive_prediction_desc_long: Averages last 3 cycles to predict cycle length
settings.fixed_prediction_hint: Predictions follow your set cycle length
settings.bc_protected_msg: 🛡️ Protected mode active. Fertility tracking disabled.

trends.short_cycle_desc: Some logged cycles are shorter than 21 days (Polymenorrhea). These are excluded from your averages to keep predictions medically accurate.
trends.adaptive_learning_desc: Log 3 full cycles to build your private baseline on this device. Currently using standard medical averages for your predictions.
trends.adaptive_learning_remaining_one: {{count}} eligible finished cycle remain to adaptive prediction get activated
trends.adaptive_learning_remaining_other: {{count}} eligible finished cycles remain to adaptive prediction get activated
trends.biology_insight: Your cycle fluctuates naturally. Keep logging to see clearer patterns.
trends.no_data_range: No data in selected range. Showing historical average.
trends.heatmap_desc: Shows when symptoms typically appear during your cycle.
trends.no_data: Not enough data in this range.
trends.pro_tip: Tip: Identifying symptom patterns by cycle day can help you prepare and manage symptoms proactively.
trends.need_data_chart: Log at least 2 cycles to see this chart.
trends.need_data_flow: Log more period flow data to see patterns.
trends.need_data_mood: Log mood data across your cycle to see emotional patterns.

timeline.gap_hint: Tracking gap – not used for predictions
timeline.short_cycle_hint: Cycle too short (<18 days) – not used for predictions

trust.title: Your Body. Your Data. Your Device.
trust.desc: Mooneva is an offline-first tracker. We do not collect your data, we do not have accounts, and we cannot read your logs.
trust.backup_hint: Have a backup? Import in Settings later.
trust.backup_alert: You can import your backup anytime in Settings > Data Management.

calibration.title: Let’s calibrate your cycle.
calibration.last_period_label: When did your last period start?
calibration.settings_hint: You can always change this in settings.

goal.title: What is your focus?
goal.track_sub: Just tell me when my period is due.
goal.fertility_sub: Show me high fertility & ovulation days.

adaptive.title: Adaptive predictions?
adaptive.desc: Instead of using a fixed cycle length, this mode automatically calculates your average based on your last 3 eligible cycles to predict your next period.
adaptive.hint: If you prefer fixed predictions based on your manual settings, you can turn this off.
adaptive.label: Adaptive Mode
adaptive.activation_note: Needs 3 full cycles to activate. Until then, your manual settings are used.

discrete.title: Camouflage Mode
discrete.desc: Need total privacy? In discrete mode, Mooneva disguises itself as a dummy to-do list. The app icon, name, and even notifications change to keep your data safe.

security.title: Secure your space.
security.desc: Your data lives locally. Anyone with your phone password can open this app unless you set a second lock.

get_started.title: Here's how to get started
get_started.period_card_body: Tap the button below, then tap days to add or remove period days. Tap Done when finished.
get_started.period_card_tip: Swipe to a past month to log previous periods.
get_started.daily_card_body: Tap any day on the calendar to log mood, symptoms, or notes.

errors.backup_password: Please set a password to secure your backup.
errors.backup_error: We encountered an issue creating your secure backup. Please try again.
errors.import_password: Please enter the password you used to encrypt this file.
errors.decryption_failed: Incorrect password or damaged file. Please verify your password and try again.
